name: antigravity-cli
tagline: Operator guide for the Antigravity CLI (agy): install, auth, plugins, sandbox settings, and using agy as a delegated coding-task backend.
verdict: Thorough, concrete reference: real commands, an explicit pitfalls section covering the likeliest failure modes (no TTY, log locations, WSL auth quirks), and a dedicated orchestration-boundary note that limits when to reach for this tool. Only soft spot: the frontmatter description states what it does but not an explicit 'use when' trigger phrase.

highlights.summary: description (line 3) says what it does (plugins, auth, sandbox) but has no explicit 'use when' trigger phrasing.
